result.summary: Found several visual layout issues, mostly related to horizontal overflow/clipping and fixed navigation overlap.

issues.description: Several horizontal sections appear wider than the viewport. The top category tab row cuts off the 'Hot Games' tab, and the game card rows show partially clipped cards on the right edge.
issues.suggestion: Ensure carousel/grid containers are intentionally scrollable with proper padding, or constrain content to the viewport. Avoid leaving important labels or cards partially cut off unless a clear carousel affordance is intended.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation appears to cover the lower game content. The bottom row of game tiles is partially hidden behind the navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content equal to or greater than the fixed nav height so cards are not obscured.

issues.description: The top category tab label 'Hot Games' is truncated to 'Hot Ga...' due to insufficient visible space.
issues.suggestion: Increase tab width, reduce label/icon spacing, or allow the tab row to snap/scroll so the full active area and text can be viewed.

issues.description: The header area is visually crowded with multiple logos, the state label, menu button, and Join Now button competing for space.
issues.suggestion: Consider simplifying the header, reducing logo sizes, or grouping secondary branding so the navigation feels less cramped on mobile.
